channel.title: Blogs on GuruSabarish
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on GuruSabarish

item.title: What is Bootstrap and How to Use in Project
item.description: Bootstrap is a framework to customize your website as mobile friendly. Bootstrap build with CSS, JavaScript and jquery. CSS and JavaScript are doing major things in bootstrap. It’s have certain layouts,components and so. We can take that things and use with our website. Official website: https://getbootstrap.com/ How to use Bootstrap in your project? We can use bootstrap with two ways. Download and use: Download Bootstrap and use with your local machine.

item.title: What Is Django and How to Install in Windows
item.description: Python made a way as framework to use python in web development. There are several number of framework to use But, the Django is quite famous than other things and flask framework is also good. Here, we will look only about Django. If you want to know about flask, Follow this link https://flask.palletsprojects.com/en/1.1.x/ What is Django? Framework is build to make our website quickly as well as user friendly. Django is a framework build with Python and it’s not a front-end and back-end.

item.title: Download Youtube Videos in Python
item.description: We should follow this program to download the Youtube videos in python. I will explain the program and “How to use this program in your computer” in below sections. #Import the library from pytube import YouTube #Get the link link = input("Enter the link: ") #enter your link #Check the link is valid or not try: yt = YouTube(link) except: print("Connection Error") #to handle exception #Process the link to video stream = yt.

item.title: Add Hugo pagination for blog or posts in hugo
item.description: In this article, we are discuss about ‘‘‘How to set hugo pagination in your website which is generated by Hugo?'''. Introduction to Hugo Hugo is a static site generator which helps to build a website easily and looks like a professional developer. Hugo is made with GOLANG and maintaining by hugo developers. Hugo is the fastest genarators camparitively other static site generators. Why hugo is so popular? You get a strong security for website To get a high Performance website Ease of use even your are not a developer Too many website themes provided by Hugo to make a website instanly.
